faqs.question: How much does ant control cost in Annadale?
faqs.answer: Our ant control services in Annadale range from $350 to $550, depending on the severity of the infestation, the size of your property, and the type of ant species involved. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before beginning any treatment.

faqs.question: What types of ants are common in Annadale, Staten Island?
faqs.answer: Annadale residents typically encounter carpenter ants, pavement ants, odorous house ants, and pharaoh ants. Carpenter ants are particularly concerning as they can damage wooden structures in homes. Our technicians are trained to identify and eliminate all common ant species found in the area.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to an ant problem in Annadale?

faqs.question: Do you offer guarantees for ant control services in Annadale?
faqs.answer: Yes, we stand behind our ant control services with a satisfaction guarantee. If ants return within the warranty period after our treatment, we'll come back and re-treat your property at no additional charge. We also offer ongoing maintenance plans to prevent future infestations.
